title: The Best Things in Life Are Free
writer: William Bowers, Phoebe Ephron, John O'Hara
actors: Gordon MacRae, Dan Dailey, Ernest Borgnine
plot: Ray joins Buddy and Lew to form a successful 1920s musical show writing team. Soon, they've got several hits on Broadway, but Buddy's ambition leads to friction among the group, as the other 2 feel increasingly left out.
